chunks.text: Order Sheet IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, BENCH AT SUKKUR Const. Petition No.D-130 of 2024 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge. Hearing of Case 1.For orders on office objections 2.For hearing of CMA 538/2024 3.For hearing of main case 31-01-2024 Syed Mureed Ali Shah, Advocate for the petitioner. Mr. Zeeshan Haider Qureshi, Law Officer of ECP. Mr. Dareshani Ali Haider ‘Ada’, D.A.G for Pakistan. Mr. Ali Raza Baloch, Assistant A.G for Sindh. ***** Mr. Nisar Ahmed Bhanbhro, Advocate has filed power on behalf of one Zia-ul-Hassan, a contesting candidate for P.S-35, Naushehro Feroze-IV. With consent, this petition is disposed of along with listed application(s) in the terms whereby the matter is referred to the District Returning Officer, Naushahro Feroze to visit the disputed polling stations, as mentioned in the order dated 16.01.2024, in presence of parties or their representatives and after hearing them decide objections of the petitioner afresh regarding polling stations, condition of the buildings, code/census blocks etc., as per law within a period of three days. JUDGE JUDGE Ahmad
